calendar.matters:
Petition To Contest Account And To Compel Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Contest Account And To Compel Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Hamilton for Deborah Kahn (Petitioner).
Jeremiah Moffit appeared by telephone for University of San Francisco (Respondent).

Counsel requested a 60 to 90-day continuance stating that they have been doing discovery and that a settlement offer is on the table. The Petition to Contest Account and to Compel Redress for Breach of Trust is continued to July 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the parties to get this done by then. If the matter is not settled, the Parties are to consider Pro Bono Mediation and if they are at an impasse, they are to meet and confer as to what it's going to take to move the matter forward.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Contest Account And To Compel Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Continued To May-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Neilson for Deborah Kahn (Petitioner).
Jeremiah Moffit appeared by telephone for the University of San Francisco (Trustee).

Mr. Neilson stated that they need time to do discovery (third party subpoenas/depositions) to ascertain what was lost (collection of jewelry), what the value is and how it got lost. The Petition to Contest Account and to Compel Redress for Breach of Trust is continued to May 9, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that discovery will be completed and the parties meet and confer to try and resolve the matter.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
